name: Bharath
notes: 11L XSA-all (real KV-sharing from block 0) + Self-Generated GPTQ Calibration (activation-aware scale selection) + Score-First Causal TTT (legal: train on already-scored val tokens) + Int6 MLP+Attn GPTQ + EMA decay=0.999 + Partial RoPE 25% + Bigram20480 + LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + doc-aware sliding-window stride=32 eval + warmdown5000.
